h39cfd292g3adag4f5fg9858gf4ff66d1ef92: Listen here - we've reached the point of no return.
h1f82ed58gb2deg402bg9d9bg7c9d46737ef7: We're not compatible, you and I - neither in thought nor in temper.
heef44189g334cg44edg938ag5bf69f3eb3c8: It is time we part ways before our enmity spills over into violence.
h8374a8a5g863eg45e2gba7bgc5de78e9e1b4: You really should stay. We're stronger together.
h0580417ag93c2g4c3agb692g47ec969fb676: No, ours was not a bond of strength but of convenience. It's outstayed its welcome.
hf3386cc0g8cbbg4454ga4d7gb3d832b60ffd: I'd wish you a bright future, but since you cannot escape your own company that would be a futile gesture.
h17d0d051g766fg4755g832fg62d6a8cb762f: So long. It hasn't been a pleasure.
h4d023c23g7025g4a62gb36eg69d0c75be481: This moment was bound to come sooner or later. Sooner is better.
ha7e303a4g2599g4390ga05agfd112d986a90: To part ways will be a release. And good riddance.
